name: @tyrannoapartment/harn
description: AI multi-agent sprint development loop orchestrator (Planner → Generator → Evaluator)

scripts.postinstall:
node -e "const v=require('./package.json').version;console.log('
  ✓ harn v'+v+' installed
  Run: harn doctor
')"
scripts.test: bash -n harn.sh && for f in lib/*.sh; do bash -n "$f" || exit 1; done && echo '✓ bash syntax OK' && grep -h 'python3 -c' lib/*.sh | grep -v '^#' | while read -r line; do :; done && python3 -c "import ast, subprocess, re; code=open('lib/input.sh').read(); blocks=re.findall(r\"python3 -c '(.+?)'\", code, re.DOTALL); [ast.parse(b) for b in blocks]; print('✓ python syntax OK')" && bash harn.sh version && bash harn.sh help > /dev/null && echo '✓ help OK'
scripts.lint: bash -n harn.sh && for f in lib/*.sh; do bash -n "$f" || exit 1; done && echo '✓ all syntax OK'
